rows.label: tev073301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Tan'celeg about Orphe Parfait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Tan'celeg if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Tan'celeg about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Tan'celeg about Orphe Parfait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Tan'celeg about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Tan'celeg about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG0001
rows.name:
We've apparently been distributing
weapons to humans through the
Sun'celeg-led Orphe Parfait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Now Ten'celeg and I have inherited
that duty, and will work together
to produce the products.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Perhaps you're interested in easy-to-use weapons that
employ advanced ether- and gravitation-control
technologies, while also allowing for rapid movement?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Or in a wide lineup of protective wear that employs
proprietary camouflage technologies to attain levels
of evasion no other company could achieve?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG0005
rows.name:
In that case, I hope you'll put our
products to use. I promise that they'll
always be a potent and efficient choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG1001
rows.name:
We have completed the autosentries
and sent them off to the Biahno
water-purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG1002
rows.name:
Thanks to the data we received from you,
we were able to create a more effective
device than we'd ever thought possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG1003
rows.name:
I don't know if the autosentries
would be able to repel an invader
of your high caliber...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG1004
rows.name:
But I suppose that if such a mighty
foe did appear, it would not be the
autosentry to which we turned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG1005
rows.name:
Instead, we would request aid from
you BLADEs. Should that day ever
come, we'll be counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2001
rows.name:
Even out here, I am studiously developing new
products for Orphe Parfait in accordance with
the duty that I inherited from Sun'celeg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2002
rows.name:
And of course, I rely on Ten'celeg's
great talent to develop my ideas
into products people desire.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2003
rows.name:
Perhaps you're interested in easy-to-use weapons that
employ advanced ether- and gravitation-control
technologies, while also allowing for rapid movement?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2004
rows.name:
Or in a wide lineup of protective wear that employs
proprietary camouflage technologies to attain levels
of evasion no other company could achieve?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2005
rows.name:
In that case, I hope you'll put our
products to use. I promise that they'll
always be a potent and efficient choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2010
rows.name:
To ensure that this debacle never
occurs again, I have decided to
handle maintenance here myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2011
rows.name:
As an Orphean, I consider Lan'cord's
actions to be unforgivable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2012
rows.name:
This is the least I could do—my
Ovah would never forgive me if I
were to shirk this responsibility.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG2013
rows.name:
And I intend to make even more
high-quality items for Rosie, the
one who protects NLA's water supply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG3001
rows.name:
I hear that Lan'cord has
been captured by BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG3002
rows.name:
That is one less danger that the
water-purification plant will have to face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG3003
rows.name:
However, indigen attacks
remain a grave threat to which
we must be ever vigilant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073301_MSG3004
rows.name:
So I have been thinking for a while now
that I should make some high-quality items
for Rosie, who guards NLA's water supply.[ST:wait ]
